description_long: This awning features a pentagonal, sloped canopy with a solid blue color, designed to provide shade and shelter in urban environments. The canopy is supported by two angled posts at the rear corners, giving it a sturdy and fixed appearance. The front edge of the canopy is straight with subtle geometric detailing, while the overall structure is sleek and modern. The material appears to be a rigid, weather-resistant metal or composite, suitable for outdoor use. The underside is open, allowing for unobstructed passage or coverage beneath. There are no visible decorative trims, branding, or signage on the canopy.
description: A modern, solid blue pentagonal awning with a sloped canopy and two angled support posts, designed for urban outdoor coverage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the straight-edged canopy and both angled support posts clearly.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view with the right support post more visible and the canopy's geometric detailing apparent.
description_view_2: Rear-angled view highlighting the symmetry of the canopy and the alignment of the support posts.
description_view_3: Opposite rear-angled view, similar to view 2 but mirrored, showing the left support post more prominently.
attribute_mounting_location: freestanding, ground-mounted with rear support posts
attribute_edge_trim_style: straight edge with subtle geometric detailing
attribute_support_structure_type: fixed frame with angled rear posts
